label: Living wage — single adult, Riverside County CA (approx)
value: roughly $27-$32/hr (~$56k-$66k/yr) for a single adult, no kids
source: MIT Living Wage Calculator (approx; verify current)
notes: Approximate — changes with rent/inflation and household size (much higher with kids). Verify your exact number at livingwage.mit.edu.

label: Registered Nurse (RN) pay — California
notes: CA pays RNs among the most nationally. CNA→LVN→RN is a laddered on-ramp. Verify current figures at BLS/EDD.

label: Skilled trades pay — California (electrician/HVAC/plumber)
notes: Earn-while-you-learn, no student debt, can't be offshored. Verify current CA figures at BLS.

label: Cybersecurity / IT security pay — California
notes: Help desk → Security+ → SOC analyst is a common no-degree ladder. Verify current figures at BLS.
